name_en: Travel Insurance, Trip Cancellation, and Medical Gaps
name_es: Seguro de viaje, cancelacion y brechas medicas
audience: Travelers, immigrants visiting family, retirees, cruise passengers, and bilingual households
site_asset: trip cancellation and emergency medical checklist
description_en: Travel insurance questions around cancellation, interruption, emergency medical care, pre-existing conditions, evacuation, baggage, cruises, and card benefits.
description_es: Preguntas sobre cancelacion, interrupcion, atencion medica de emergencia, condiciones preexistentes, evacuacion, equipaje, cruceros y beneficios de tarjetas.

pain_samples.title: Trip cancellation confusion
pain_samples.excerpt: Travelers often do not know whether illness, job loss, visa delays, airline cancellation, or fear of travel counts as a covered reason.

pain_samples.title: Gastos medicos fuera de EE. UU.
pain_samples.excerpt: Familias bilingues preguntan si su seguro medico normal cubre emergencias durante viajes o visitas de familiares.

pain_samples.title: Credit card benefit overlap
pain_samples.excerpt: Users confuse card trip protections with a dedicated travel policy and miss medical or evacuation exclusions.

content_opportunities: Build a trip cost, medical risk, and cancellation-reason worksheet.
Add a pre-existing condition and lookback-period checklist with policy wording reminders.
Link travel pages to health, claims, scams, and state insurance department resources.
content_opportunities_es: Crear una hoja para costo del viaje, riesgo medico y motivo de cancelacion.
Agregar lista para condiciones preexistentes y periodo de revision segun la poliza.
Enlazar viaje con salud, reclamos, estafas y departamentos estatales.

name_en: Dental Insurance Costs, Waiting Periods, and Major Services
name_es: Seguro dental, costos, esperas y servicios mayores
audience: Adults comparing dental plans, families, seniors, and uninsured patients facing major dental bills
site_asset: root canal and major dental cost worksheet
description_en: Dental plan education for premiums, deductibles, annual maximums, waiting periods, preventive care, basic services, major services, orthodontia, Medicare gaps, and Marketplace dental options.
description_es: Educacion sobre primas, deducibles, maximos anuales, esperas, cuidado preventivo, servicios basicos y mayores, ortodoncia, brechas de Medicare y opciones del Marketplace.

pain_samples.title: Root canal sticker shock
pain_samples.excerpt: Patients ask why a dental plan still leaves a large bill for a root canal, crown, extraction, or implant.

pain_samples.title: Annual maximum confusion
pain_samples.excerpt: Users compare premiums but miss annual maximums, waiting periods, and major-service coinsurance.

pain_samples.title: Medicare y dental
pain_samples.excerpt: Personas mayores preguntan si Medicare cubre dentista regular, dentaduras o emergencias dentales.

content_opportunities: Add a dental annual maximum break-even worksheet.
Create a root canal, crown, and implant document checklist.
Link dental pages to Medicare, ACA, claims, and scams content.
content_opportunities_es: Agregar calculo de equilibrio para maximo anual dental.
Crear lista para endodoncia, corona e implante.
Enlazar dental con Medicare, ACA, reclamos y estafas.

name_en: Umbrella Insurance and Extra Liability Protection
name_es: Seguro umbrella y proteccion adicional de responsabilidad
audience: Homeowners, landlords, drivers, parents of teen drivers, and households with assets to protect
description_en: Umbrella policy education for excess liability, underlying auto and homeowners limits, exclusions, rental properties, teen drivers, lawsuits, and asset protection questions.
description_es: Educacion sobre responsabilidad adicional, limites subyacentes de auto y vivienda, exclusiones, propiedades en renta, conductores jovenes, demandas y proteccion de activos.

pain_samples.title: Teen driver liability
pain_samples.excerpt: Parents ask whether auto limits are enough after adding a teen driver or buying a larger home.

pain_samples.title: Underlying limit requirements
pain_samples.excerpt: Users do not know that umbrella policies often require specific auto or homeowners limits underneath.

pain_samples.title: Exclusiones de umbrella
pain_samples.excerpt: Lectores preguntan si umbrella cubre negocio, renta, difamacion, mascotas o accidentes fuera del hogar.

content_opportunities: Build an umbrella gap worksheet tied to auto, home, and rental-property scenarios.
Create a checklist for underlying limits and exclusions before buying.
Link umbrella content to auto, home, claims, and state department pages.
content_opportunities_es: Crear hoja de brecha umbrella conectada con auto, vivienda y renta.
Agregar lista de limites subyacentes y exclusiones.
Enlazar umbrella con auto, vivienda, reclamos y estado.

name_en: Cyber Liability Insurance for Small Businesses
name_es: Seguro de responsabilidad cibernetica para pequenos negocios
audience: Small business owners, freelancers, clinics, online sellers, consultants, and home-based businesses
site_asset: cyber incident and contract exposure checklist
description_en: Cyber liability education for data breach response, phishing, ransomware, client contracts, notification costs, business interruption, and basic cybersecurity controls.
description_es: Educacion sobre brechas de datos, phishing, ransomware, contratos de clientes, costos de notificacion, interrupcion del negocio y controles basicos.

sources.title: SBA: Stay safe from cybersecurity threats

pain_samples.title: Client contract requires cyber coverage
pain_samples.excerpt: Freelancers and consultants ask what cyber liability limit is needed when a client contract requires coverage.

pain_samples.title: Phishing and wire transfer loss
pain_samples.excerpt: Small businesses confuse cyber liability, crime coverage, funds transfer fraud, and technology E&O.

pain_samples.title: Negocio pequeno y ransomware
pain_samples.excerpt: Duenos bilingues preguntan si una poliza normal de negocio cubre ransomware o robo de datos.

content_opportunities: Add a contract-driven cyber limit worksheet for freelancers and small businesses.
Separate cyber liability, tech E&O, crime, and business interruption in a bilingual comparison table.
Link cyber pages to business liability, scams, claims, and state licensing checks.
content_opportunities_es: Agregar hoja de limite cyber basado en contratos.
Separar cyber liability, E&O tecnologico, crimen e interrupcion en tabla bilingue.
Enlazar cyber con negocio, estafas, reclamos y licencias estatales.

name_en: Wedding Insurance, Event Cancellation, and Vendor Risk
name_es: Seguro para boda, cancelacion de evento y riesgo de proveedores
audience: Couples, families paying for weddings, event planners, venues, and bilingual households

description_en: Wedding and special event insurance education for cancellation, postponement, liability, liquor exposure, vendor failure, deposits, weather, illness, and venue requirements.
description_es: Educacion sobre cancelacion, aplazamiento, responsabilidad, alcohol, falla de proveedores, depositos, clima, enfermedad y requisitos del lugar.

pain_samples.title: Venue requires liability certificate
pain_samples.excerpt: Couples ask whether a venue's liability requirement is the same as cancellation coverage.

pain_samples.title: Vendor deposit risk
pain_samples.excerpt: Families worry about losing deposits if a vendor closes, no-shows, or refuses a refund.

pain_samples.title: Boda y clima
pain_samples.excerpt: Lectores preguntan si lluvia, enfermedad, inmigracion familiar o cambio de lugar permite recuperar costos.

content_opportunities: Build a wedding deposit and cancellation-reason worksheet.
Create a venue liability versus cancellation comparison guide.
Link wedding pages to travel, scams, claims, and state department complaint resources.
content_opportunities_es: Crear hoja de depositos y motivos de cancelacion.
Comparar responsabilidad del lugar con cobertura de cancelacion.
Enlazar boda con viaje, estafas, reclamos y quejas estatales.

name_en: Jewelry Insurance, Appraisals, and Scheduled Property
name_es: Seguro para joyas, tasaciones y propiedad programada
audience: Engagement ring buyers, homeowners, renters, collectors, and families with inherited jewelry
description_en: Jewelry insurance education for appraisals, scheduled personal property, homeowners sublimits, mysterious disappearance, deductibles, replacement cost, and documentation.
description_es: Educacion sobre tasaciones, propiedad personal programada, sublimites de vivienda, desaparicion misteriosa, deducibles, costo de reemplazo y documentacion.

pain_samples.title: Engagement ring coverage gap
pain_samples.excerpt: Buyers ask whether homeowners or renters insurance covers a ring at full value outside the home.

pain_samples.title: Appraisal versus receipt
pain_samples.excerpt: Users confuse purchase receipt, appraisal, replacement value, cash value, and scheduled limit.

pain_samples.title: Perdida de joya
pain_samples.excerpt: Familias preguntan si una poliza cubre perdida accidental o desaparicion sin prueba de robo.

content_opportunities: Add a jewelry documentation checklist for receipt, appraisal, photos, serial numbers, and storage.
Explain homeowners sublimits versus scheduled personal property.
Link jewelry pages to renters, homeowners, claims, and state complaint guides.
content_opportunities_es: Agregar lista de recibo, tasacion, fotos, numeros y almacenamiento.
Explicar sublimites de vivienda frente a propiedad programada.
Enlazar joyas con inquilinos, vivienda, reclamos y quejas estatales.

name_en: Drone Insurance for Small Business and Real Estate Work
name_es: Seguro para drones en negocios y fotografia inmobiliaria
audience: Drone pilots, real estate photographers, inspectors, wedding videographers, freelancers, and small agencies
site_asset: drone liability and client contract checklist
description_en: Drone insurance education for liability, hull coverage, client contract limits, FAA recreational versus commercial rules, Part 107, property damage, privacy claims, and gig work.
description_es: Educacion sobre responsabilidad, cobertura del dron, limites por contrato, reglas FAA recreativas o comerciales, Parte 107, dano a propiedad, privacidad y trabajo independiente.

sources.title: FAA Recreational Flyers and Modeler Community-Based Organizations
FAA Certificated Remote Pilots including Commercial Operators

pain_samples.title: Client asks for drone insurance certificate
pain_samples.excerpt: Freelancers ask what liability limit a real estate broker, venue, or commercial client may expect.

pain_samples.title: Drone crash damage
pain_samples.excerpt: Pilots confuse damage to the drone itself with liability for property damage or injury.

pain_samples.title: Dron recreativo o comercial
pain_samples.excerpt: Usuarios preguntan si cobrar por fotos cambia las reglas y el tipo de seguro necesario.

content_opportunities: Create a drone contract exposure worksheet for real estate and event work.
Separate hull, liability, privacy, and business property questions.
Link drone pages to business liability, gig work, claims, and FAA source pages.
content_opportunities_es: Crear hoja de exposicion contractual para fotografia inmobiliaria y eventos.
Separar dano al dron, responsabilidad, privacidad y propiedad de negocio.
Enlazar dron con negocio, gig work, reclamos y fuentes FAA.

name_en: State Insurance Rules, Complaints, Licensing, and Rate Checks
name_es: Reglas estatales, quejas, licencias y tarifas de seguros
audience: Consumers comparing coverage across states, movers, homeowners, drivers, Spanish-speaking families, and claimants
site_asset: state DOI source map + complaint and license checklist
description_en: State-by-state insurance education for complaints, licensing lookup, company status, auto and property rule verification, rate filing questions, residual markets, and disaster resources.
description_es: Educacion por estado para quejas, licencias, estado de companias, verificacion de auto y propiedad, tarifas, mercados residuales y recursos por desastre.

sources.title: NAIC File a Complaint Against an Insurance Carrier

pain_samples.title: Which state handles my complaint?
pain_samples.excerpt: Consumers moving states or dealing with out-of-state carriers ask which department can handle a claim complaint.

pain_samples.title: Agent license before purchase
pain_samples.excerpt: Users want to know whether a caller, online seller, or broker is licensed before sharing personal information.

pain_samples.title: Departamento estatal en espanol
pain_samples.excerpt: Familias bilingues buscan donde presentar quejas y como verificar una compania si la poliza esta en ingles.

content_opportunities: Create state pages storing state, topic, source URL, reviewed date, effective date when available, and affected article section.
Add state links inside auto, homeowners, claims, ACA, and business pages.
Avoid static legal claims; send users to current DOI and federal sources for controlling rules.
content_opportunities_es: Crear paginas estatales con estado, tema, URL, fecha revisada, fecha efectiva y seccion afectada.
Agregar enlaces estatales dentro de auto, vivienda, reclamos, ACA y negocio.
Evitar afirmaciones legales estaticas y dirigir a fuentes oficiales actuales.

name_en: Funeral Cost by State and Final Expense Planning
name_es: Costo de funeral por estado y planificacion de gastos finales
audience: Adult children, seniors, widows, bilingual families, and households comparing final expense coverage

description_en: Final expense education for funeral price lists, burial versus cremation, state cost variation, prepaid funeral questions, beneficiary records, and small life policy planning.
description_es: Educacion sobre listas de precios funerarios, entierro o cremacion, variacion por estado, planes prepagados, beneficiarios y polizas pequenas de vida.

pain_samples.title: Funeral price shock
pain_samples.excerpt: Families ask how to estimate funeral, burial, cremation, travel, cemetery, and unpaid bill costs before buying a final expense policy.

pain_samples.title: Prepaid funeral versus insurance
pain_samples.excerpt: Adult children confuse prepaid funeral arrangements, burial insurance, final expense policies, and savings accounts.

pain_samples.title: Costos por estado
pain_samples.excerpt: Familias hispanas preguntan cuanto cuesta un funeral en su estado y si deben incluir traslado o viaje familiar.

content_opportunities: Add a state-adjusted funeral cost worksheet with FTC Funeral Rule links.
Create a burial versus cremation planning checklist.
Link final expense, life insurance, claims, and state guide pages.
content_opportunities_es: Agregar hoja de costo funerario ajustado por estado con enlaces FTC.
Crear lista para entierro frente a cremacion.
Enlazar gastos finales, vida, reclamos y guias estatales.

name_en: High-Risk Life Insurance, Chronic Conditions, and Occupations
name_es: Seguro de vida de alto riesgo, enfermedades cronicas y trabajos riesgosos
audience: Applicants with chronic illness, high-risk jobs, hazardous hobbies, older applicants, and Spanish-speaking families
description_en: Life insurance education for chronic conditions, high-risk occupations, hazardous hobbies, prescription history, no-exam policies, graded benefits, exclusions, and underwriting documents.
description_es: Educacion sobre enfermedades cronicas, trabajos riesgosos, hobbies peligrosos, historial de medicamentos, polizas sin examen, beneficios graduados, exclusiones y documentos de suscripcion.

pain_samples.title: Chronic condition application
pain_samples.excerpt: Applicants ask whether diabetes, pancreatitis, mental health history, medication, or prior denial makes life insurance impossible.

pain_samples.title: Graded benefit confusion
pain_samples.excerpt: Users misunderstand waiting periods, graded death benefits, accidental-only periods, and no-exam policy limits.

pain_samples.title: Trabajo riesgoso
pain_samples.excerpt: Familias preguntan si construccion, manejo comercial, trabajo nocturno o hobbies extremos cambian precio o elegibilidad.

content_opportunities: Create a high-risk underwriting document checklist.
Explain graded benefit, simplified issue, guaranteed issue, and fully underwritten policies.
Link high-risk life pages to life calculator, final expense, scams, and state licensing checks.
content_opportunities_es: Crear lista de documentos para suscripcion de alto riesgo.
Explicar beneficio graduado, emision simplificada, garantizada y suscripcion completa.
Enlazar alto riesgo con calculadora de vida, gastos finales, estafas y licencias.

name_es: Seguro parametrico para desastres y activadores
audience: Homeowners in disaster-prone areas, small businesses, farms, travelers, and readers comparing newer insurance models
description_en: Parametric insurance education for trigger-based payouts, hurricanes, earthquakes, flood or weather events, basis risk, claim documentation differences, and disaster planning.
description_es: Educacion sobre pagos por activador, huracanes, terremotos, inundacion o clima, riesgo base, diferencias de documentacion y planificacion de desastres.

pain_samples.title: Trigger versus damage
pain_samples.excerpt: Readers ask why a parametric policy can pay based on a measured event rather than the exact repair bill.

pain_samples.title: Basis risk
pain_samples.excerpt: Users need to understand the gap between event-trigger payout and actual loss.

pain_samples.title: Pago automatico por huracan
pain_samples.excerpt: Lectores preguntan si un seguro parametrico reemplaza seguro de vivienda, flood insurance o ayuda de desastre.

content_opportunities: Create a trigger, payout, and basis-risk worksheet.
Compare parametric coverage with homeowners, flood, and disaster assistance without treating it as a replacement.
Link parametric pages to home, flood, state, and claims resources.
content_opportunities_es: Crear hoja de activador, pago y riesgo base.
Comparar parametrico con vivienda, inundacion y ayuda de desastre sin presentarlo como reemplazo.
Enlazar parametrico con vivienda, flood, estado y reclamos.
